name: Google Voice
description: Google's telephony service providing a US phone number for calls, texts, and voicemail across devices.

years.notes: Initial Google Voice launch mark (March 2009). Blue rounded-square tile containing a white speech bubble with bottom-left tail and a blue handset glyph inside. Reconstructed at 24x24 from the Open Icon Library SVG on Wikimedia Commons (public domain); used as the recognizable mark across the 2009-2012 period before Google's icon system was unified.

August 2018 redesign aligning Google Voice with the Hangouts icon family. Material Design product-icon style: teal circular badge with a downward speech-bubble tail and a white handset glyph centered. Material drop shadow simplified to match project conventions. Used 2018-2020.

October 2020 Google Workspace rebrand. The dark green Hangouts-style speech bubble was dropped in favor of an open landline-phone glyph with signal waves built from two greens. Notably skipped the four-color Workspace rule and stayed on a single-hue palette.

2026 Google Workspace gradient refresh. Cyan-to-green linear-gradient stack matching the wider Workspace 2026 system: a handset path with a cyan-to-green sweep and a quarter-circle speech-bubble panel with a green-to-cyan sweep. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the authoritative Figma community file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026'.
